ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: 67% brow wholegrain rice, 16% olive oil, 10% chickpeas, 7% seasoning (rice flour, salt, yeast extract, garlic powder, spices [cumin, black pepper, chilli powder, hot paprika powder, white pepper], onion powder, acidity regulator: citric acid, natural flavouring, paprika powder, herbs),
